title: Build Dev Department Paperclip Plugin Phase 1 Files and PR
job:
Build the Development Department Paperclip plugin Phase 1 in the plugins/dev-department/ directory.

IMPORTANT: You MUST create files, commit them, and push. Do not just analyze — BUILD.

Target directory: plugins/dev-department/

Create the following file structure:

plugins/dev-department/
  package.json
  paperclip-plugin.json (manifest)
  src/
    worker/
      index.ts (worker entrypoint)
      state.ts (plugin.state CRUD operations)
      types.ts (all TypeScript interfaces)
    ui/
      index.tsx (UI entrypoint)
      components/
        DepartmentView.tsx (main department view)
        PhaseList.tsx (ordered phase list)
        PhaseDetail.tsx (phase detail with metadata editing)
        ConversationRefs.tsx (conversation URL management)
        ProjectHeader.tsx (project objective, status, active phase)

PLUGIN MANIFEST (paperclip-plugin.json):
{
  "id": "dev-department",
  "apiVersion": 1,
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "displayName": "Development Department",
  "description": "Phase-aware build governance for phased architecture projects",
  "author": "Mike Jackson",
  "categories": ["productivity"],
  "capabilities": ["plugin.state.read", "plugin.state.write"],
  "entrypoints": {
    "worker": "src/worker/index.ts",
    "ui": "src/ui/index.tsx"
  },
  "ui": {
    "slots": [
      {
        "type": "projectSidebarItem",
        "id": "dev-department-sidebar",
        "displayName": "Development Department",
        "exportName": "DepartmentSidebar",
        "entityTypes": ["project"],
        "routePath": "dev-department"
      },
      {
        "type": "detailTab",
        "id": "dev-department-phases",
        "displayName": "Phases",
        "exportName": "PhasesTab",
        "entityTypes": ["project"]
      }
    ]
  }
}

DATA MODEL (TypeScript interfaces in src/worker/types.ts):

DevProject: { id, name, objective, owner, status (Draft|Active|Blocked|Archived), activePhaseId, roadmapSummary, createdAt, updatedAt }

Phase: { id, projectId, phaseNumber, title, objective, description, status (DraftSpec|SpecApproved|PRDAttached|ReadyForBuild|Accepted|ReworkRequired|Closed), prerequisites, successCriteria, riskNotes, freezeState (Locked|FrozenDownstream|EditableDownstream|DownstreamRevisionRequired), sortOrder, createdAt, updatedAt }

Spec: { id, phaseId, title, sourceRef, version, author, approvalState, notes }
PRD: { id, phaseId, title, sourceRef, version, approvalState, deviationNotes, notes }
BuildDispatch: { id, phaseId, status, buildClass, riskLevel, targetRepo, environment, createdAt } (placeholder)
BuildOutput: { id, phaseId, status, implementationSummary, artifactLinks, notes } (placeholder)
Review: { id, phaseId, decision, comments, impactOnFuturePhases, decidedAt } (placeholder)
RevisionEvent: { id, sourcePhaseId, affectedPhaseIds, summary, reason, approvedBy, createdAt } (placeholder)
ConversationReference: { id, scopeType (project|phase), scopeId, system (Claude|ChatGPT|Other), role (planning|prd|architecture|review|revision), url, status (active|reference|archived), authoritative, notes }

WORKER (src/worker/index.ts + state.ts):
Implement CRUD for all entity types using plugin.state.read/write. Key state by entity type and ID. Support:
- Create/read/update/delete DevProject
- Create/read/update/delete/reorder Phases
- Create/read/update Spec and PRD per phase
- Create/read/update/delete ConversationReference at project and phase scope
- Phase status and freeze state are independent

UI (React components):
- DepartmentView: shows project list or single project detail
- ProjectHeader: name, objective, status dropdown, active phase indicator
- PhaseList: ordered list with drag-to-reorder, status badges, freeze indicators, add/delete buttons
- PhaseDetail: edit all phase fields, show linked spec/PRD, conversation references, grayed-out placeholders for build output/review/revision
- ConversationRefs: add URL, select system (Claude/ChatGPT/Other), assign role, toggle authoritative, notes

DO NOT BUILD: PopeBot dispatch, build queue, verification, GitHub ingestion, dashboard analytics, downstream revision automation.

COMMIT all files and create the PR.
